cycle_sync_block.note: Cycle/block shuffles may alter harmonic coherence or inject leakage; high p is inconclusive, not erasure of measured ratios.

half_cycle_sync_block.note: Cycle/block shuffles may alter harmonic coherence or inject leakage; high p is inconclusive, not erasure of measured ratios.

interpretation.primary_claim: Use amplitude_shuffle as the primary log-spectrum scan-max null.
interpretation.stress_tests: Cycle-sync block tests assess dependence on periodic block structure; they are not automatic rejection tests for measured harmonic ratios.
interpretation.important: Exact 2/3 pairs and Koide-style triplets are direct frequency-ratio outputs and are not invalidated by block-shuffle stress p-values.
